# External Sources

Use this folder for upstream learning material that is safe to reuse.

Preferred approach:

- Use Git submodules for full upstream repos.
- Preserve the upstream `LICENSE` file.
- Preserve attribution in notes.
- Do not paste large chunks of third-party code directly into local notebooks without tracking where it came from.

Good candidates to add here:

- `TorchCFM` - MIT: https://github.com/atong01/conditional-flow-matching
- `Diffusion Explainer` - MIT: https://github.com/poloclub/diffusion-explainer
- `score_sde_pytorch` - Apache-2.0: https://github.com/yang-song/score_sde_pytorch
- `denoising-diffusion-pytorch` - MIT: https://github.com/lucidrains/denoising-diffusion-pytorch

Keep as links only unless license is clarified:

- Hugging Face Annotated Diffusion: https://github.com/huggingface/blog/blob/main/annotated-diffusion.md
- minDiffusion: https://github.com/cloneofsimo/minDiffusion
- acids-ircam diffusion notebooks: https://github.com/acids-ircam/diffusion_models
